campuses.name: Lee County Campus
campuses.description: The main Lee County campus in Sanford, NC, offering a full range of academic and workforce programs.

buildings.name: Cameron Hall
buildings.description: Administrative offices, admissions, financial aid, and general education classrooms.

buildings.name: Dennis A. Wicker Civic & Conference Center
buildings.description: Civic and conference center hosting college events, community programs, and large gatherings.

buildings.name: Chavis Hall
buildings.description: Science laboratories, nursing simulation labs, and health sciences classrooms.

buildings.name: Horton Hall
buildings.description: Technology programs, computer labs, and information technology classrooms.

buildings.name: Shank Hall
buildings.description: Workforce development programs, culinary arts, and continuing education.

buildings.name: Student Services Center
buildings.description: Student services, counseling, career center, disability services, and testing center.

buildings.name: Library / Learning Resource Center
buildings.description: Library collections, computer labs, tutoring center, and study spaces.
buildings.hours: Mon–Thu 7:30 AM – 8:00 PM, Fri 7:30 AM – 5:00 PM

buildings.name: Trades & Industrial Building
buildings.description: Automotive, welding, HVAC, electrical, and construction trades programs.

buildings.name: Physical Education / Fitness Center
buildings.description: Gymnasium, fitness center, and physical education facilities.

campuses.name: Chatham Campus
campuses.description: The Chatham County campus in Pittsboro, NC, serving the Chatham County community with academic and workforce programs.

buildings.name: A Building – Main Building
buildings.description: Administrative offices, classrooms, computer labs, and student services for the Chatham Campus.

buildings.name: B Building – Technology Center
buildings.description: Technology classrooms, computer labs, and workforce training facilities.

buildings.name: C Building – Trades Center
buildings.description: Trades and technical programs including carpentry and electrical.

buildings.name: Library / Media Center
buildings.description: Library, media resources, and academic support services.
buildings.hours: Mon–Thu 8:00 AM – 7:00 PM, Fri 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM

campuses.name: Harnett Campus
campuses.address: 1075 East Cornelius Harnett Boulevard, Lillington, NC 27546
campuses.description: The Harnett County campus in Lillington, NC, providing academic and workforce training to the Harnett County community.

buildings.name: Main Building
buildings.description: Administrative offices, classrooms, computer labs, and student services for the Harnett Campus.

buildings.name: Workforce Development Center
buildings.description: Workforce development, continuing education, and industry training programs.

buildings.name: Allied Health Building
buildings.description: Nursing, medical assisting, and allied health programs.

buildings.name: Library
buildings.description: Library, computer access, and academic support.
buildings.hours: Mon–Thu 8:00 AM – 7:00 PM, Fri 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM

campuses.name: Siler City Center
campuses.description: The Siler City Center serves western Chatham County with continuing education and select curriculum programs.

buildings.name: Siler City Center Main Building
buildings.description: Classrooms, computer labs, and student support services for the Siler City area.
